_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Proceed with Surgery for Priapism only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation

preauth.label: Clinical notes of current visit detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, investigations, advise for daycare procedure
Discharge Summary of last admission for surgery for priapism procedure

claim.label: Clinical notes/discharge summary of the current visit with the details of treatment given

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical notes of the current visit detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, investigations, advise for daycare procedure submitted?
Was the Discharge Summary of last admission for surgery for priapism procedure submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Clinical notes/discharge summary of the current visit with the details of treatment given submitted?

common_queries: Clinical findings and/or earlier discharge summary do not indicate the necessity for a follow-up procedure.
Clinical notes of current visit detailing examination findings, previous surgery/procedure, investigations, advise for daycare procedure not submitted or incomplete.

clinical_key_pointers: Ischemic priapism: Erection lasting more than four hours or unrelated to sexual interest or stimulation
Ischemic priapism: Rigid penile shaft, but the tip of penis (glans) is soft
Nonischemic priapism: Erection lasting more than four hours or unrelated to sexual interest or stimulation
Nonischemic priapism: Erect but not fully rigid penile shaft
